original_abstract: Azomethine imines react with alkenes and alkynes to give pyrazolines, pyrazolidines, pyrazolopyridines, indazoloisoquinolines, pyrazolo[1,5-<italic>a</italic>]isoquinolines and pyrazolopyrazolones through regio-, stereo- and enantioselective 1,3-dipolar cycloadditions.
humanized_abstract: Azomethine imines undergo regioselective, stereoselective and enantioselective 1,3-dipolar cycloadditions with alkenes and alkynes to yield various heterocyclic compounds, which include pyrazolines, pyrazolidines, pyrazolopyridines, indazoloisoquinolines, pyrazolo[1,5-<italic>a</italic>]isoquinolines and pyrazolopyrazolones.

document.output: Azomethine imines undergo regioselective, stereoselective and enantioselective 1,3-dipolar cycloadditions with alkenes and alkynes to yield various heterocyclic compounds, which include pyrazolines, pyrazolidines, pyrazolopyridines, indazoloisoquinolines, pyrazolo[1,5-<italic>a</italic>]isoquinolines and pyrazolopyrazolones.
document.input: Azomethine imines react with alkenes and alkynes to give pyrazolines, pyrazolidines, pyrazolopyridines, indazoloisoquinolines, pyrazolo[1,5-<italic>a</italic>]isoquinolines and pyrazolopyrazolones through regio-, stereo- and enantioselective 1,3-dipolar cycloadditions.
